title: Entombed
body:
# <font color="	#b19cd9">☠️ Entombed</font>
**A Gravestone (tomb) mod with support for Sable**

If you have any feature requests or issues, please let me know in the [GitHub repo](https://github.com/AdoLovesChicken/Entombed/issues).

### Features:
- Safe placement
- Support for when gamerule KeepInventory is on
- Places items back exactly where they were
- Properly vanishes with curse of vanishing and drops any curse of binding items on grave retrieval
- Command for tomb retrieval (`/tomb`)

### Compatibility with other mods:
- Compatibility with [Sable](https://modrinth.com/mod/sable) and [Create Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics): tombs in the dimensions with end seas can become part of the end sea
- Migration from [HenkelMax's GraveStone Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravestone-mod) and [Gravestone x Curios API Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravestone-x-curios-api-compat)
- Support for [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade): custom tooltips showing owner
- Support for [Inventorio](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventorio), [Curios](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios), [Accessories](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories), and [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets)
- Support for [Soulbound Enchantment](https://modrinth.com/mod/ly-soulbound-enchantment)

##
